# blastshield_egress_policy (Resource)

Manages a Blastshield egress_policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "blastshield_egress_policy" "allow_updates" {
  name                  = "allow-package-updates"
  enabled               = true
  allow_all_dns_queries = false
  services              = [blastshield_service.https.id]
  groups                = [blastshield_group.web_servers.id]
  destinations          = ["0.0.0.0/0"]

  dns_names = [
    {
      name      = "packages.example.com"
      recursive = false
    }
  ]

  tags = {
    environment = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allow_all_dns_queries` (Boolean)
- `destinations` (Set of String)
- `dns_names` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dns_names))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `groups` (Set of Number)
- `name` (String)
- `services` (Set of Number)

### Optional

- `tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `system_tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--dns_names"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dns_names`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `recursive` (Boolean)
